sources.notes: Fetched full alphabetical function listing page; extracted 515 listed rows (some rows list two related functions e.g. 'FIND, FINDB' which were split into separate entries), covering current, compatibility, and cube function categories.

Fetched the 'List of Google Sheets functions' page; extracted all functions grouped by the page's own category headings (Date, Engineering, Filter, Financial, Google, Info, Logical, Lookup, Math, Operator, Statistical, Text, Database, Parser, Array, Web, AI).

The LibreOffice wiki page 'List of Calc Functions' (wiki.documentfoundation.org) was blocked by an anti-bot service (Anubis / 403-style block) and could not be fetched. Instead fetched the official help.libreoffice.org function category index (04060100.html) and then fetched every linked category sub-page individually: Database (04060101), Date & Time (04060102), Financial Part One (04060103), Financial Part Two (04060119), Financial Part Three (04060118), Information (04060104), Logical (04060105), Mathematical (04060106), Array (04060107), Spreadsheet (04060109), Text (04060110), Add-in (04060111), Add-in Analysis Part One (04060115), Add-in Analysis Part Two (04060116), and Statistical Parts One-Five (04060181-04060185). The generic Statistical overview page (04060108) itself listed no functions directly, only links to the five part pages, which were fetched separately.

Blocked by Anubis anti-bot protection when fetched; returned an access-denied interstitial page instead of content. Not used as a source; official help.libreoffice.org category pages were used instead.
